items.name_en: Loewe🌟 Mini grainy cowhide Puzzle Handbag🌟
items.name_cn:
Loewe🌟 Mini grainy cowhide Puzzle Handbag🌟
First appearance tote*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines*This mini version is made of classic cowhide🌟The mini Puzzle can hold, for example, a small vertical wallet, most sizes of phones (max 6.1 inches) and a sunglasses case, worn on the shoulder or crossbody*Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap*One internal slip pocket and one external zip pocket at the back*Cowhide zip pull*Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
size:18*12.5*8CM
model:061838

specs.rawTitle:
Loewe🌟 Mini grainy cowhide Puzzle Handbag🌟
First appearance tote*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines*This mini version is made of classic cowhide🌟The mini Puzzle can hold, for example, a small vertical wallet, most sizes of phones (max 6.1 inches) and a sunglasses case, worn on the shoulder or crossbody*Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap*One internal slip pocket and one external zip pocket at the back*Cowhide zip pull*Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
size:18*12.5*8CM
model:061838

items.name_en: Puzzle messenger bag!
items.name_cn:
Puzzle messenger bag!
❤️Size 36.5x27.5x10 cm, unique cubic shape, precise cutting creates volume, comfortable touch, extremely practical. This fashionable and compact messenger bag can be worn on one shoulder or crossbody, the detachable strap can be adjusted to the most comfortable length.
❤Made of imported Spanish cowhide🐄Soft and comfortable to the touch. Made of soft grainy cowhide, with a large zip pocket, herringbone pattern cotton canvas lining, two internal slip pockets, and a convenient zip pocket on the back, all in the same color with Anagram embossing.
❤️High-end exclusive custom hardware, cowhide, German imported Saffiano thread, imported YKK zippers, ZP craftsmanship, for you to enjoy top quality!
Model: 36036 Bronze Grey

specs.rawTitle:
Puzzle messenger bag!
❤️Size 36.5x27.5x10 cm, unique cubic shape, precise cutting creates volume, comfortable touch, extremely practical. This fashionable and compact messenger bag can be worn on one shoulder or crossbody, the detachable strap can be adjusted to the most comfortable length.
❤Made of imported Spanish cowhide🐄Soft and comfortable to the touch. Made of soft grainy cowhide, with a large zip pocket, herringbone pattern cotton canvas lining, two internal slip pockets, and a convenient zip pocket on the back, all in the same color with Anagram embossing.
❤️High-end exclusive custom hardware, cowhide, German imported Saffiano thread, imported YKK zippers, ZP craftsmanship, for you to enjoy top quality!
Model: 36036 Bronze Grey

items.name_en: 👄L New messenger bag👉11360,🎺 Featuring imported pebbled calfskin paired with a soft back leather, adjustable cotton webbing shoulder strap, comfort is greatly increased👍 As a perfect interpretation of the classic messenger bag, it offers functionality while maintaining a minimalist and elegant masculine silhouette. Fold-over top flap closure with double buckle fastening. Novel compact volume, suitable for smart practical style. Main features: Made of soft textured calfskin, webbing shoulder strap, herringbone cotton canvas lining, two internal slip pockets, four rows of patchwork silhouette leather flaps, dimensions: 33*25*10.3cm

items.name_en: Mini 👄L New Geometric Bag, lightweight, versatile styling. The new solid Puzzle Lo Pink is a must-have! The highlight is this season's satin calfskin, which is smoother, glossier, and holds its shape better. The strap, metal buckle, and lining are all color-coordinated, offering a novel yet high-end look. The wide strap design is a pleasant surprise, and the back zip pocket has been replaced by a small pocket. The new ceiling item! Just buy it. Model: L10173B, Size: 18*7.5*12cm
